trans-unit.source: Here you can manage the prompt that drives your AI chat: model, instructions, and optional reference to an OpenAI Prompt created in the OpenAI dashboard.
trans-unit.target: Here you can manage the prompt that drives your AI chat: model, instructions, and optional reference to an OpenAI Prompt created in the OpenAI dashboard.

trans-unit.source: Enter an internal name for this prompt.
trans-unit.target: Enter an internal name for this prompt.

trans-unit.source: Select the OpenAI model to use. All available models are shown. Model compatibility is validated (via the Responses API) when you save.
trans-unit.target: Select the OpenAI model to use. All available models are shown. Model compatibility is validated (via the Responses API) when you save.

trans-unit.source: Enter a custom OpenAI model name (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo-preview). Only use this if you select "Enter Custom Model" above.
trans-unit.target: Enter a custom OpenAI model name (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo-preview). Only use this if you select "Enter Custom Model" above.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of output tokens per response (mapped to max_output_tokens on the Responses API).
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of output tokens per response (mapped to max_output_tokens on the Responses API).

trans-unit.source: How many text sections from your synced website content the AI may read to answer a single question (1–20). This does not limit how many questions visitors can ask. Lower values (4–8) keep answers focused and reduce cost per question; higher values (12–20) help with broad questions that combine content from many pages, e.g. intranet research. Default: 8.
trans-unit.target: How many text sections from your synced website content the AI may read to answer a single question (1–20). This does not limit how many questions visitors can ask. Lower values (4–8) keep answers focused and reduce cost per question; higher values (12–20) help with broad questions that combine content from many pages, e.g. intranet research. Default: 8.

trans-unit.source: Controls randomness in responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very random).
trans-unit.target: Controls randomness in responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very random).

trans-unit.source: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling (0.0 = focused, 1.0 = diverse).
trans-unit.target: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling (0.0 = focused, 1.0 = diverse).

trans-unit.source: Enter system instructions. Ignored when an OpenAI Prompt ID is set below.
trans-unit.target: Enter system instructions. Ignored when an OpenAI Prompt ID is set below.

trans-unit.source: Optional. Reference a Prompt created in the OpenAI dashboard (e.g. pmpt_abc123). When set, local System Instructions are ignored and the dashboard prompt text is used. Model and sampling/token settings from this record are still sent.
trans-unit.target: Optional. Reference a Prompt created in the OpenAI dashboard (e.g. pmpt_abc123). When set, local System Instructions are ignored and the dashboard prompt text is used. Model and sampling/token settings from this record are still sent.

trans-unit.source: pmpt_... (leave empty to use the local instructions above)
trans-unit.target: pmpt_... (leave empty to use the local instructions above)

trans-unit.source: Optional. Pin to a specific version of the dashboard prompt. Leave empty to always use the latest published version.
trans-unit.target: Optional. Pin to a specific version of the dashboard prompt. Leave empty to always use the latest published version.

trans-unit.source: Whether this prompt is enabled for the chat module.
trans-unit.target: Whether this prompt is enabled for the chat module.

trans-unit.source: Short reason why the last validation failed (if any).
trans-unit.target: Short reason why the last validation failed (if any).

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? This only affects the local record; nothing is removed from OpenAI.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? This only affects the local record; nothing is removed from OpenAI.

trans-unit.source: Welcome to the OpenAI Prompt screen.
trans-unit.target: Welcome to the OpenAI Prompt screen.

trans-unit.source: Here you can create and manage the prompt that drives your AI chat module.
trans-unit.target: Here you can create and manage the prompt that drives your AI chat module.

trans-unit.source: All Models: All available models from your OpenAI account are shown
trans-unit.target: All Models: All available models from your OpenAI account are shown

trans-unit.source: Custom Models: Select "Enter Custom Model" to use any OpenAI model
trans-unit.target: Custom Models: Select "Enter Custom Model" to use any OpenAI model

trans-unit.source: Model Validation: Compatibility is checked against the Responses API when you save the prompt.
trans-unit.target: Model Validation: Compatibility is checked against the Responses API when you save the prompt.

trans-unit.source: View all available models on OpenAI Platform
trans-unit.target: View all available models on OpenAI Platform

trans-unit.source: Please enter a custom model name when selecting manual override.
trans-unit.target: Please enter a custom model name when selecting manual override.

trans-unit.source: Please select a model or enter a custom model name.
trans-unit.target: Please select a model or enter a custom model name.

trans-unit.source: The model "%s" is not compatible with the Responses API. Please select a different model.
trans-unit.target: The model "%s" is not compatible with the Responses API. Please select a different model.

trans-unit.source: No API key found in configuration. Please check your OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: No API key found in configuration. Please check your OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: Only one prompt is allowed per configuration. If a prompt already exists for this configuration, you will be redirected to edit it.
trans-unit.target: Only one prompt is allowed per configuration. If a prompt already exists for this configuration, you will be redirected to edit it.

trans-unit.source: Only one prompt is allowed per configuration. You are being redirected to the existing prompt.
trans-unit.target: Only one prompt is allowed per configuration. You are being redirected to the existing prompt.
